content: Flora Executor v1.1.0 is now available! ImGui UI with modern features!

embeds.title: Flora Executor v1.1.0 - ImGui UI with Centered Tabs & Console Updater
embeds.description: A powerful Roblox script executor with ImGui-based UI and a new console-based updater.

fields.name: What's New
fields.value:
- **Centered Main Tabs**: Replaced default ImGui tabs with centered button-style navigation
- **Button-Style Navigation**: Script Editor, Settings, Terminal as centered buttons
- **Blue Notifications**: All notifications now display in blue text
- **Startup Logs**: Default startup logs showing DLL location and success status
- **Clear Log in Terminal**: Clear Log button only visible in Terminal tab
- **Console-Based Updater**: New Flora Updater with ASCII banner and color-coded logs
- **Auto-Extraction**: Updater automatically extracts ZIP files to 'Flora Executor' folder
- **Directory Selection**: Choose custom installation path or use current directory
- **Auto-Update Check**: Automatic version checking with Y/N confirmation
- **Persistent Config**: Installation path saved to %appdata%/Flora

fields.name: How to Use
fields.value:
1. Download the ZIP from GitHub
2. Run FloraUpdater.exe (or extract and run Flora.exe directly)
3. Choose installation directory or use current directory
4. Files auto-extract to 'Flora Executor' folder
5. Attach to Roblox and execute scripts

fields.name: System Requirements
fields.value:
- Windows 10 or later
- DirectX 11
- Roblox installed
- Administrator privileges (recommended)

fields.name: Notes
fields.value:
- Includes new console-based updater with ASCII banner
- All files organized in 'Flora Executor' subfolder
- Auto-extraction with 1-second delays for visibility

fields.name: Detection Status
fields.value:
Currently Updated to LATEST ROBLOX VERSION
Currently Around 85% UNC
Currently FULLY undetectable
